creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
Here is the new port, udated an improved.
If someone like it :)

Tested on FreeBSD 2.2.8
Tested on FreeBSD 3.4
Tested on FreeBSD 4.1

On system without 'mailer.conf' it is installed in the standard directorys.
On systems with 'mailer.conf' it is moved to '$PREFIX'.

smrsh will now use the right path and directory.
Vacation is tested with smrsh.

kind regards Dirk

- Dirk Meyer, Im Grund 4, 34317 Habichtswald, Germany

# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may

#

echo c - sendmail-8.11.1/pkg

sed 's/^X//' >sendmail-8.11.1/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-sendmail-8.11.1/pkg/COMMENT'
XThe mail server
END-of-sendmail-8.11.1/pkg/COMMENT

Xbin/purgestat

Xbin/mailq
Xbin/vacation
Xbin/rmail
Xsbin/sendmail
Xsbin/mailstats
Xsbin/makemap
Xsbin/praliases

Xlibexec/mail.local

mkdir -p sendmail-8.11.1/files > /dev/null 2>&1

Xdefine(`confEBINDIR',`%%PREFIX%%/libexec')
Xdefine(`confMANROOT',`%%PREFIX%%/man/cat')
Xdefine(`confMANROOTMAN',`%%PREFIX%%/man/man')
Xdefine(`confMBINDIR',`%%PREFIX%%/sbin')
Xdefine(`confSBINDIR',`%%PREFIX%%/sbin')
Xdefine(`confUBINDIR',`%%PREFIX%%/bin')
Xdefine(`confCCOPTS',`-DCMDDIR="\"%%PREFIX%%/libexec/sm.bin\"" -DPATH="\"/bin:/usr/bin\""')
END-of-sendmail-8.11.1/files/site.config.m4
echo x - sendmail-8.11.1/files/site.config.m4.2
sed 's/^X//' >sendmail-8.11.1/files/site.config.m4.2 << 'END-of-sendmail-8.11.1/files/site.config.m4.2'
Xdefine(`confCCOPTS',`-DCMDDIR="\"%%PREFIX%%/libexec/sm.bin\"" -DPATH="\"/bin:/usr/bin\""')
END-of-sendmail-8.11.1/files/site.config.m4.2
echo x - sendmail-8.11.1/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >sendmail-8.11.1/Makefile << 'END-of-sendmail-8.11.1/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	sendmail
X# Date created:		20 Apr 2000
X# Whom:			dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
X#
X# $FreeBSD: $
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	sendmail
XPORTVERSION=	8.11.1
XCATEGORIES=	mail
XMASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.sendmail.org/pub/sendmail/
XDISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}.${PORTVERSION}
X
XMAINTAINER=	dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
XPLIST=		${WRKDIR}/.PLIST.more
X
X.if exists(/etc/mail/mailer.conf)
Xpre-configure:
X	${SED} -e "s=%%PREFIX%%=${PREFIX}=" \
X	${FILESDIR}/site.config.m4 >${WRKSRC}/devtools/Site/site.config.m4
X.else
Xpre-configure:
X	${SED} -e "s=%%PREFIX%%=${PREFIX}=" \
X	${FILESDIR}/site.config.m4.2 >${WRKSRC}/devtools/Site/site.config.m4
X
XPREFIX=		/usr
XMANPREFIX=	/usr/share
X.endif
X
XPLIST_SUB+=	PREFIX=${PREFIX:S=${PREFIX}/==}
XSENDMAIL=	${PREFIX}/sbin/sendmail
X
XMAN1=	mailq.1 newaliases.1 vacation.1
XMAN5=	aliases.5
XMAN8=	sendmail.8 mailstats.8 makemap.8 praliases.8 smrsh.8 \
X 	mail.local.8 rmail.8
X
Xpre-install:
X	${CAT} ${PKGDIR}/PLIST >${PLIST}
X.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
X	cd ${WRKSRC} && find cf -type f | \
X	${AWK} '{print "share/doc/sendmail/" $$1}' >>${PLIST}
X	cd ${WRKSRC} && find -d cf -type d | \
X	${AWK} '{print "@dirrm share/doc/sendmail/" $$1}' >>${PLIST}
X.endif
X
X# We want mail.local and rmail for our system.
X# the build install catmans only, we have to fix this.
Xpost-install:
X	( cd ${WRKSRC}/mail.local && ${MAKE} force-install )
X	( cd ${WRKSRC}/rmail && ${MAKE} force-install )
X.for i in ${MAN8}
X	@rm -f ${MANPREFIX}/man/cat8/${i} ${MANPREFIX}/man/cat8/${i}.gz
X	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/*/${i} ${MANPREFIX}/man/man8
X.endfor
X.for i in ${MAN5}
X	@rm -f ${MANPREFIX}/man/cat5/${i} ${MANPREFIX}/man/cat5/${i}.gz
X	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/*/${i} ${MANPREFIX}/man/man5
X.endfor
X.for i in ${MAN1}
X	@rm -f ${MANPREFIX}/man/cat1/${i} ${MANPREFIX}/man/cat1/${i}.gz
X	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/*/${i} ${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
X.endfor
X.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
X	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/sendmail
X	@cd ${WRKSRC}; tar cf - cf |\
X		(cd ${PREFIX}/share/doc/sendmail; tar xf -)
X.endif
X.if exists(/etc/mail/mailer.conf)
X	${SED} \
X	-e "s=^sendmail[ 	]*/.*$$=sendmail	${SENDMAIL}=" \
X	-e "s=^send-mail[ 	]*/.*$$=send-mail	${SENDMAIL}=" \
X	-e "s=^mailq[ 	]*/.*$$=mailq		${SENDMAIL}=" \
X	-e "s=^newaliases[ 	]*/.*$$=newaliases	${SENDMAIL}=" \
X		/etc/mail/mailer.conf >/etc/mail/mailer.conf.bak
X	${MV} /etc/mail/mailer.conf.bak /etc/mail/mailer.conf
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-sendmail-8.11.1/Makefile
exit
